description: Style Note Taking the bright colours of summer and nature, vero moda inspires the woman of style and substance to experiment with a range of vibrant shades. So match the shade to your personality! Mix and match from a variety of colours and prints for a feminine look, or a modern twist. Product Details Magenta tube dress with detachable shoulder straps, has an elasticated straight neckline, slightly elasticated and smocked at the waist, gathered from the waist down, black sash at the back, asymmetric hemline and inner lining Material and Care 100% polyester Machine wash cold at 40 degrees using a mild detergent Do not bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Use cold iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M which measures 80 cm from the neckline to the longest point of hemline
